  • Overview

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AccessCheckResult
    Represents the result of an access check.
    ADiscordOAuthService
    Base service for handling Discord OAuth2 flow with Javalin.
    ADiscordPurchase
     
    AEntitlementService<V>
    Base class for handling Discord Entitlements and managing subscriptions based on them.
    AFeature<Price,Meta>
    Represents a feature that can be accessed by users with a subscription.
    AKofiPurchase
    Represents a purchase made on kofi.
    AKofiService<V>
    Service for handling Ko-fi webhooks and managing purchases and subscriptions.
    AMailEntry
    Represents a registered mail address for a user.
    AMailService<V>
    Core mail service for handling mail registration, verification, and sending.
    ApiException
     
    AuthorizeUrl
     
    CategoryPOJO
    POJO for Category serialization.
    ChannelPOJO
    POJO for GuildChannel serialization.
    ChannelViewPOJO
    POJO for serializing all channels of a guild.
    Choice
     
    Choice.ChoiceBuilder
     
    Colors
     
    Colors.Pastel
    Contains pastel color objects.
    Colors.Strong
    Contains colors with strong colors.
    Completion
     
    Connection
     
    ConnectionType
     
    DiscordClient
    Client for interacting with the Discord API.
    DiscordGuild
    Represents a Discord guild (server).
    DiscordOAuth
    Configuration for Discord OAuth.
    DiscordSerializationModule
    Jackson module for serializing Discord (JDA) entities.
    DiscordUser
    Represents a Discord user.
    Empty
     
    ErrorResponseWrapper
    Generic error response structure for API errors.
    ExceptionContext
     
    ExceptionHandler
     
    FailureReason
     
    GlobalErrorHandler
     
    GuildPOJO
    POJO for Guild serialization.
    Integration
     
    IntegrationType
     
    InteractionFeature
     
    InteractionMeta
     
    Interactions
    Holds the interaction based access rules.
    InterceptingEventManager
     
    IOAuthToken
    A token associated with a user.
    IPurchase
     
    ISubscriptionContext
    Represents the set of enabled subscriptions for a user or guild.
    ISubscriptions
    Access to the subscriptions of an entity
    ISupporterErrorSupplier
    Provides error messages for the SupporterMiddleware.
    IUserMails<V>
     
    IUserMailsProvider<V>
     
    IUserProvider
     
    JoinGuildData
    Data for joining a guild.
    JoinGuildPayload
     
    Key
    Represents a key that can be registered in a Registry.
    Kofi
    Configuration for Ko-fi integration.
    KofiShopItem
    Represents an item in a Ko-fi shop order.
    KofiTransaction
    Represents a transaction received from a Ko-fi webhook.
    LocalePOJO
    POJO for DiscordLocale serialization.
    Mail
    Represents an email to be sent.
    Mailing
    Main mailing configuration class containing SMTP, IMAP settings and user credentials.
    MailServiceConfig<V>
    Configuration for the AMailService.
    MailSettings
    Settings for a mail service (SMTP or IMAP).
    MailSource
    Represents the source of a mail registration.
    MailSourceRegistry
    Registry for MailSources.
    MailTemplates
    Handles mail templates loading and preparation.
    Member
     
    MemberPOJO
    POJO for Member serialization.
    OAuthScope
     
    Pair<A,B>
    Contains a immutable pair of two values
    Platform
     
    PlatformSubscription
    Represents a plaform configuration for a subscription on a platform A default identifier can be found at PurchaseType
    Prompt
    Controls the prompt behavior of the authorization page.
    PurchaseType
     
    QuadConsumer<T1,T2,T3,T4>
    Represents an operation that accepts two input arguments and returns no result.
    QuadFunction<T1,T2,T3,T4,R>
    Represents a function that accepts four arguments and produces a result.
    ReactionPOJO
    POJO for RichCustomEmoji serialization.
    Registry<V>
    A registry for Key implementations.
    Result<T,V>
    Represents a result of an operation that can fail with a reason.
    Retry
     
    RolePOJO
    POJO for Role serialization.
    SkuTarget
     
    SubcriptionContextProvider
    Provider for ISubscriptionContexts.
    Subscription
     
    Subscription
    Represents a subscription configuration A subscription might be retrieved on different platforms A default platform set can be found in Platform
    SubscriptionKey
    Represents a unique identifier for a subscription.
    SubscriptionResult
    Represents the result of an attempt to enable or disable a subscription.
    SupporterConfiguration<FeatureID, Price, FeatureMeta>
    Configuration for the supporter module.
    SupporterKeys
    Keys used for the InvocationContext key-value store.
    SupporterMiddleware<FID>
    Middleware for the JDAC dispatcher.
    SupporterModule
    A Jackson module for serializing and deserializing Key implementations.
    SupporterRegistry
    Central registry for all supporter-related keys.
    SupporterValidator<FeatureID>
    A validator for checking access to features.
    ThrowingConsumer<T, Exception>
    Represents an operation that accepts a single input argument and returns no result.
    ThrowingFunction<R,T,E>
     
    ThrowingRunnable
     
    TokenResponse
    Represents the response from a token exchange or refresh.
    TriConsumer<T1,T2,T3>
    Represents an operation that accepts two input arguments and returns no result.
    TriFunction<T1,T2,T3,R>
    Represents a function that accepts three arguments and produces a result.
    Triple<A,B,C>
    Contains a immutable triple of three values.
    Type
    Represents the type of a Ko-fi transaction.
    UnauthorizedException
    Exception thrown when a Ko-fi webhook request is unauthorized.
    Urls
     
    User
